title: Air India Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Lab Technician Posts
description: Air India Limited (Air India) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy for 01 Lab Technician Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Electrical, Electronics, and Mechanical Engineering can apply for the Air India Jobs 2026 . Interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, select...
